top_signals.title: Gold Drops for Third Day as Jitters Over US Rate Outlook Worsen
top_signals.summary: Gold fell for a third day as traders weighed signals the Federal Reserve may move to tighten policy and tracked US-Iran peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Won Slides Toward Weakest Since 2009 as Global Funds Sell Stocks
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s won slid toward its weakest level since the global financial crisis, leading a retreat in Asian currencies, as the dollar strengthened and overseas investors sold local equities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
